name: AGKK Cadastre Portal (KAIS)
operator: Agency for Geodesy, Cartography and Cadastre (AGKK)
dataType: Cadastral parcels, property boundaries, ownership data
description: Official Bulgarian cadastral information system providing online access to parcel boundaries, property data and cadastral maps for the entire country.

name: Bulgaria INSPIRE Geoportal
dataType: Multi-thematic INSPIRE spatial data: administrative boundaries, addresses, hydrology, transport
description: National INSPIRE-compliant spatial data portal aggregating datasets from Bulgarian public institutions under the EU INSPIRE directive.

name: NIMH Bulgaria - National Institute of Meteorology and Hydrology
operator: National Institute of Meteorology and Hydrology (BAS)
dataType: Temperature, precipitation, wind, humidity, synoptic observations, hydrological data
license: national (data provided on request, fees may apply)
description: Bulgarian national meteorological and hydrological service providing weather forecasts, climate data and hydrological monitoring from a dense station network.

name: Geological Institute - Bulgarian Academy of Sciences
operator: Geological Institute, Bulgarian Academy of Sciences
dataType: Geological maps (1:100k, 1:500k), mineralogy, hydrogeology, geotectonics
description: Primary geological research institute of Bulgaria providing digital geological maps, mineralogical and hydrogeological datasets via EGDI.

name: ExEA - Executive Environment Agency
dataType: Air quality, water quality, Natura 2000, protected areas, environmental monitoring
description: Bulgarian environmental monitoring agency managing real-time air and water quality data, Natura 2000 zone boundaries and environmental assessment datasets.

name: FGU Geoportal - Federal Geodetic Administration (FBiH)
operator: Federal Administration for Geodetic and Real Property Affairs (FGU)
dataType: Cadastral parcels, property boundaries, orthophoto, topographic maps
description: Geoportal of the Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina providing cadastral parcel data, orthophotos and topographic maps as part of the FBiH spatial data infrastructure.

name: RGURS Geoportal - Republika Srpska Cadastre
operator: Republic Administration for Geodetic and Property Affairs (RUGIPP)
dataType: Cadastral parcels, property boundaries, e-Katastar, orthophoto
description: Geoportal of Republika Srpska providing e-Katastar access to cadastral data, property boundaries and orthophotos for the RS entity of Bosnia and Herzegovina.

name: FHMZ - Federal Hydrometeorological Institute (FBiH)
dataType: Temperature, precipitation, wind, air quality, hydrological data, seismological data
description: Hydrometeorological service of the Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina providing weather forecasts, climate atlas data, and hydrological monitoring from 15 synoptic stations.

name: FHMZ Climate Atlas of Federation BiH
dataType: Mapped climate normals: temperature, precipitation, wind, sunshine
description: Online climate atlas of the Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina compiling mapped climate normals for the 1961-1990 reference period.

name: Montenegro Real Estate Administration Geoportal
operator: Cadastre and State Property Administration of Montenegro
dataType: Cadastral parcels, ownership data, orthophoto, topographic maps, administrative boundaries
description: National geoportal of Montenegro providing cadastral parcel data, property ownership information, orthophotos and topographic maps under INSPIRE compliance.

name: IHMS Montenegro - Institute of Hydrometeorology and Seismology
dataType: Temperature, precipitation, wind, seismological data, water quality, air quality
spatialResolution: point (120 meteo + 40 hydro + 17 air quality stations)
license: national (data on request, fees may apply)
description: Montenegrin national hydrometeorological and seismological service operating meteorological, hydrological, air quality and seismic monitoring networks.

name: Montenegro Government Real Estate Portal
dataType: Real estate administration information, e-services, geodetic survey data
description: Official government portal of Montenegro's Real Estate Administration providing information on cadastral services, geodesy and property registration.

name: AREC Geoportal - Agency for Real Estate Cadastre
dataType: Cadastral parcels, land registry, orthophoto, LiDAR, topographic maps
description: One Stop Shop Portal of North Macedonia's AREC providing cadastral parcel data, land registry, orthophoto imagery and LiDAR data through the national geoportal.

name: North Macedonia NSDI Geoportal
dataType: Multi-thematic spatial datasets: administrative boundaries, transport, hydrology
description: National Spatial Data Infrastructure portal of North Macedonia aggregating government spatial datasets in compliance with the INSPIRE directive.

name: UHMR - National Hydrometeorological Service of North Macedonia
dataType: Temperature, precipitation, wind, water quality, hydrological data
description: National hydrometeorological service of North Macedonia providing weather forecasts, water quality monitoring and climate data.

name: ASIG National Geoportal of Albania
dataType: Cadastral parcels, administrative boundaries, orthophoto, geology, protected areas, addresses
description: Albania's national geoportal and spatial data infrastructure providing access to cadastral, geological, environmental and administrative boundary datasets.

name: IGEO - Institute of GeoSciences Albania
operator: Institute of GeoSciences (IGEO), Polytechnic University of Tirana
dataType: Seismological bulletins, meteorological observations, hydrological data, geological hazard assessments
description: Albania's sole national geosciences institute operating the seismic, meteorological and hydrological monitoring networks and publishing hazard assessments.

name: Albanian Geological Survey (SHGJSH)
dataType: Geological maps (1:50k, 1:200k), mineral resources, hydrogeology
description: Albanian state geological survey providing geological mapping, mineral resource assessment and earth science advisory services since 1952.

name: GeoSrbija - National Geoportal of Serbia
dataType: Multi-thematic: cadastre, topography, orthophoto, administrative boundaries, land use, 335+ datasets
description: Serbia's national digital geospatial platform aggregating 335+ datasets from public institutions with 44 geospatial services and 10 million requests per year.

name: RGZ e-Cadastre - Republic Geodetic Authority
dataType: Cadastral parcels, property rights, land registry, address register
license: national (view free, certified documents fee-based; address data on Open Data Portal)
description: Serbian electronic cadastre providing online access to property data, land registry and address register with public access to parcel-level information.

name: RHMZ Serbia - Republic Hydrometeorological Service
dataType: Temperature, precipitation, wind, humidity, hydrological water levels, radar imagery
license: national (data on request, fees may apply)
description: Serbian national hydrometeorological service providing real-time weather and hydrological observations, forecasts and radar data for 54 major hydrological stations.

name: Geological Survey of Serbia
dataType: Geological maps (1:100k, 1:1M), mineral resources, hydrogeology, geotechnics
description: Serbian national geological survey providing geological mapping, mineral resource inventories and geotechnical assessments with data accessible through EGDI.

name: Public Cadastral Map of Ukraine
operator: State Service of Ukraine for Geodesy, Cartography and Cadastre (StateGeoCadastre)
dataType: Cadastral parcels, land use, ownership, mineral deposits, oil/gas wells, Emerald Network
description: Ukraine's public cadastral map providing parcel-level land data, mineral deposits, oil/gas wells and environmental overlays with open access.

name: Ukraine NSDI Geoportal
operator: State Service of Ukraine for Geodesy, Cartography and Cadastre
dataType: Multi-thematic spatial datasets: topography, imagery, administrative boundaries
description: Ukraine's national spatial data infrastructure portal providing discovery and access to government geospatial datasets, OGC-compliant since joining the Open Geospatial Consortium.

name: Ukrainian Hydrometeorological Center (UkrHMC)
dataType: Temperature, precipitation, wind, severe weather warnings, hydrological forecasts
description: Ukrainian national hydrometeorological service providing weather forecasts, severe weather warnings and hydrological monitoring, modernized with EUMETNET support.

name: Ukrainian Hydrometeorological Institute (UHMI)
operator: Ukrainian Hydrometeorological Institute (NAS/Ministry of Internal Affairs)
dataType: Climate research data, hydrometeorological observations, oceanographic data
description: Ukrainian research institute focused on hydrometeorology, climate science and oceanography, publishing the journal on Ukrainian hydrometeorology.

name: Ukrainian Geological Survey (StateGeoNadra)
operator: State Service of Geology and Mineral Resources of Ukraine (Derzhheonadra)
dataType: Geological maps, mineral resource inventories, exploration permits, subsoil data
license: national (open geological reports, licensing for commercial use)
description: Ukrainian geological survey managing mineral exploration permits and providing digitized geological reports covering 5000+ books and 125 critical raw mineral deposits.

name: GeoportalUA - Ukraine Geoportal
dataType: Land use, geology, mineral deposits, groundwater, fossil fuels, metallogenic provinces
description: Comprehensive Ukrainian geoportal combining cadastral, geological, hydrological and environmental datasets with around 1000 open data records.

name: Ukraine Open Data Portal
operator: Ministry of Digital Transformation of Ukraine
dataType: Multi-domain open data including geospatial, economy, health, infrastructure
description: Ukraine's national open data portal with over 80,000 datasets across environment, geography, infrastructure and statistics sectors.

name: Belhydromet - Belarus Hydrometeorological Center
operator: Republican Center for Hydrometeorology, Radioactive Pollution and Environmental Monitoring
dataType: Temperature, precipitation, wind, radiation monitoring, hydrological data, aviation weather
license: national (data on request, fees apply for commercial use)
description: Belarusian national hydrometeorological service providing weather forecasts, radioactive contamination monitoring, hydrological and aviation meteorological services.

name: Belarus Public Cadastral Map
dataType: Cadastral parcels, land boundaries, administrative units, address register
description: Public cadastral map of Belarus providing free online viewing of land parcel boundaries, administrative units and address data from the unified cadastral system.

name: State Committee on Property - Geodesy and Cartography
operator: State Committee on Property of the Republic of Belarus
dataType: Geodetic reference networks, topographic maps, cartographic products
description: Belarusian state authority managing geodetic networks, topographic mapping and cartographic production for the territory of Belarus.

name: Belarus Municipal GIS Portal
dataType: Urban planning, land management, infrastructure, municipal geospatial data
description: Belarusian geoinformation portal providing municipal-level GIS data for urban planning, land management and infrastructure analysis.

name: ASP Moldova - Public Services Agency Cadastre
dataType: Property register extracts, cadastral plans, real estate valuations
license: national (fee-based official documents, online ordering since 2023)
description: Moldova's Public Services Agency providing electronic cadastral services including property register extracts, valuation data and cadastral plans for the entire country.

name: Moldova NSDI Geoportal
operator: Agency for Geodesy, Cartography and Cadastre (AGCC)
dataType: Administrative boundaries, cadastral data, topographic maps, orthophoto
description: Moldova's national geoportal managed by the Agency for Geodesy, Cartography and Cadastre providing spatial data discovery and viewing services.

name: Moldova GeoData Portal
dataType: Geospatial open data: boundaries, infrastructure, environment, agriculture
description: Moldova's government open geodata portal providing free access to geospatial datasets on boundaries, infrastructure, agriculture and environmental themes.

name: Moldova State Hydrometeorological Service
dataType: Temperature, precipitation, wind, severe weather alerts, agrometeorological data
description: Moldovan national hydrometeorological service providing EUMETNET-standard weather forecasts, Meteoalarm warnings and agrometeorological monitoring from 42 modern stations.
